○ pv-small · Add rate limit header to password reset endpoint   [● P3 · OPEN]
Owner: Stephen Howard · Type: task
Created: 2026-04-16 · Updated: 2026-04-16

DESCRIPTION
Add a Retry-After header to the 429 response from the password reset endpoint. Update the existing rate-limit middleware test to assert the header.

DESIGN
Update one middleware branch and its dedicated test. No cross-domain work.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
- [ ] Retry-After header present on 429 responses
- [ ] Test asserts header value
